# v1.6.3

## Features

- Moved AI summary and translation output into the workspace-root `.mde/translations/` directory.
- Preserved workspace-relative subdirectories for nested Markdown AI output so files with the same name in different folders do not overwrite each other.
- Moved pasted, copied, and imported Markdown image assets to file-adjacent `mde-assets/` directories.
- Kept legacy `.mde/assets/...` Markdown image references previewable and repairable by copying uniquely matched legacy assets into the adjacent `mde-assets/` directory without rewriting the source file during read/open.

## Bug Fixes

- Hardened Markdown asset path handling in both the main process and renderer with a shared normalizer that rejects traversal, encoded traversal, unsafe slash forms, absolute paths, and URL-like paths.
- Constrained copied and imported image migration with realpath containment checks so relative image references cannot pull files from outside the source root into `mde-assets/`.
- Skipped stale legacy `.mde/assets` directories during recursive copy/import while preserving unrelated `.mde` subtrees such as history, Agent Chat, and automation documents.

## Breaking Changes

- None. Existing `.mde/assets/...` image references remain compatible for preview and repair.

## Maintenance

- Bumped workspace release metadata to `1.6.3` for the root package and desktop app.
- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for workspace-root AI output, adjacent image assets, legacy repair behavior, read-path source immutability, unsafe asset-path rejection, copy/import containment, and stale legacy asset subtree skipping.

## Documentation/User Manual

- Updated the zh-CN AI manual to document workspace-root `.mde/translations/` summary and translation output.
- Updated the zh-CN editor, workspace, index, and troubleshooting manual pages to document adjacent `mde-assets/` image storage, legacy `.mde/assets` compatibility, and repair behavior.

## Verification

- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `git diff --check`
- Architecture review: ALL PASS.
- General review: ALL PASS.
- Manual divergent testing: ALL PASS after four rounds covering AI output storage, image paste/save/legacy repair, copy/import safety, adjacent regressions, performance, response speed, usability, and visual quality.

## Artifacts

- GitHub Release workflow should publish macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS updater artifacts for `v1.6.3`.
- Optional macOS signing and notarization secrets are not required for the no-paid-account release path; macOS artifacts may be unsigned if signing secrets are absent.
